title: Create: Renewable Zeiton
description: A Create and Tardis Refined add-on that allows Zeiton to be renewable using Crushing Wheels
body:
An addon for Tardis Refined and Create for a renewable way to produce Zeiton. To produce, you put Fool's Stone into a crushing wheel setup, and there is a 5% chance Zeiton Nuggets will be produced, and a 50% chance you get regular Stone back.

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9ec20e694bc09c9ccaebbe71ebb74f51cbc21407.png)

You may use this datpack in your modpacks, but do not repost without my permission


Check out my other projects at [https://modrinth.com/user/Wolfram_24](https://modrinth.com/user/Wolfram_24)
